payload.answer: Open ideas about knowledge graphs include: how to represent heterogeneous data in a KG, scalable graph storage and query performance, provenance and trust in KG reasoning, integration with machine learning workflows, and robust evaluation of KG quality. Planning to learn basic Python first (NetworkX, RDFLib, SPARQL) to experiment with KG concepts and evaluate ideas iteratively.
